title: Towards personalized epigenomics: learning shared chromatin landscapes and joint de-noising of histone modification assays.
author: Narendra T Visona G Cardona CJ Abbott J Schweikert G
content: S-EPMC12714695 PMC12714695 Towards personalized epigenomics: learning shared chromatin landscapes and joint de-noising of histone modification assays. Epigenetic mechanisms enable cellular differentiation and the maintenance of distinct cell types. They enable rapid responses to external signals
